hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE" in *src/lib/*.js) echo '[hook] src/lib is the single source of the pure helpers. Run `bun run build` to regenerate src/full.liquid and the .gs, update the matching *.test.js, then run `bun test .`. If you changed middleware.js logic, bump MIDDLEWARE_VERSION in the .gs.template (ADR 0006).' ;; *.template) echo '[hook] template changed. Run `bun run build` to regenerate the committed src/full.liquid / .gs, then `bun test .` (ADR 0006).' ;; *full.liquid|*.gs) echo '[hook] GENERATED FILE - do not edit directly. Edit src/lib/*.js or the matching *.template, then run `bun run build` (ADR 0006).' ;; esac
